betterquesting:10.desc:8:
No, I am not the first to achieve Fractallite Halite.
In a different form, in a different way, the Arbiter had access to it. Their process did not involve a black hole, it probably some sort of magic. I do know it happened, because I now know that the recursion held within fluix, imbued long ago in the Proxima Belt, it comes from Fractallite Halite. Part of the Mission, bestowed upon a material.
What would turn into the Twilight Horde, the Great Beasts, before the corruption from the Twilight Demon and the Soul Fiend, they held on to Fractallite Halite too.
A material that represents Ascension, Divinity, Will. Made accessible through many means. Allowing for the freedom of its discoverer.
